slides.title: Testing whether launch attributes are signal, not noise
body: Ulta lipstick launches are the cleanest place to test whether early attribute signal survives audit.
The point is to turn a noisy first read into a tighter management narrative.

slides.title: Included launches
slides.body: The cohort still skews comfort-led rather than novelty-led.
slides.implication: Implication: care language matters more than novelty language.

products.body: Hydrating stick form with high brand familiarity.
Tint-forward form framed as easy daily wear.
Shade story is bolder, but the message still leans wearable.

slides.title: What survived vs what failed
slides.body: Audit keeps one modest comfort-led signal and removes the sustainability false positive.

left.heading: Survived
items: Long-wear remains a credible support feature

right.heading: Failed
items: Retailer sustainability boilerplate inflated the first pass

slides.calloutBody: The signal is real, but smaller than the first read implied.
